title: Short Fire
body:
![Difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f188a411b1ecab07e822362679c60abf8ed15f0f.jpeg)
![whit pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3097053f86fb578942966be7b3a577cfe212a5a.jpeg)

📋 About

The fire is lower, so it does not block as much from the image. This is especially useful in PVP situations.

❓ How to use

Copy the pack into your resource packs folder or Drag and Drop it in the Resource pack Selection. Select the pack.
